name: Fog Cloud
description: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. The fog lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.
effect: Creates a heavily obscured fog zone in a 20-foot radius. Creatures inside are blinded to what is beyond it and vice versa. Heavily obscured terrain imposes disadvantage on attacks from and into the zone.
notes: Concentration — dropping concentration ends the fog immediately
Engine gap: persistent AoE terrain zones (heavily obscured, attack disadvantage within) not yet implemented [~]
Modeled currently as effect prose; full AoE zone mechanic requires engine support
